title: Cross section measurements for(n,2n), (n,a), and (n,p) reactions on rhenium isotopes around 14 MeV neutrons and their theoretical calculations of excitation functions

x4freetext: reactions on rhenium isotopes around 14 MeV neutrons
and their theoretical calculations of excitation

x4freetext: Natural rhenium foils of 3.04-3.12mm thickness and
99.99% purity were made into round disks with a
germanium ORTEC detector made in USA (its crystal
diameter is 70.1mm and crystal length is 72.3mm) with
a relative efficiency of 68% and an energy resolution
The samples were radiated lasted for 6.5-10 h.
The cooling time of the irradiated sample was
approximately 18 min-136.32 h, and the measuring time
Neutrons in the 14 MeV region with a yield
ranging from 4E10 n/s to 5E10 n/s were generated from
the T(d,n)4He reaction under a deuteron beam energy
of 255 keV and a beam current of 350 uA.
